name: handoff
description: Session handoff for the next agent. Loads a pending HANDOFF.md at session start so a new session resumes where the last left off, gives a non-blocking reminder to record unfinished and newly-discovered work before wrapping up, and ships the handoff skill that writes, updates, and clears the rolling handoff. Standalone — enable or disable independently of the other workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Hand off in-flight work to the next agent
interface.longDescription: Loads a pending HANDOFF.md at session start so a new session resumes where the last left off, gives a non-blocking reminder to record unfinished and newly-discovered work before wrapping up, and ships the handoff skill that writes, updates, and clears a single rolling HANDOFF.md. Standalone — enable or disable independently of the other workflows.
